rationale: Elec. Code §253.134 governs civil penalties by the Ethics Commission for campaign violations. It bears no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: This title does not prohibit the imposition of civil penalties by the commission in addition to criminal penalties or other sanctions imposed by law.
_note: Rule text is from Election Code campaign finance provisions; no overlap with proposed homestead exemption change.
